_note: EDIT-ME placeholders. tags: 'engineering' | 'coding' | 'physics-tools'. featured:true renders larger. Replace owner and every project marked EDIT-ME with your real details. images:[] uses a generated gradient cover.
intro: Engineering and software projects — plus the design system and data-driven tools that power this site.

projects.title: Physics Solved — design system & data-driven tools
projects.summary: The vanilla-JS component library and design system behind this site: equation finders, formula sheets, FRQ practice, a periodic table, and calculators — all configured from JSON.
projects.description: A zero-dependency (ES2020) front-end bundle served to a Squarespace site via jsDelivr. A tiny core scans the page for [data-ps-app] mounts and renders components from JSON in /data; registry.json is the single source of truth, so adding a course or subject never requires JS edits. Fully scoped .ps-* styles, WCAG AA contrast, keyboard support, prefers-reduced-motion, printable formula sheets, JSON-LD for SEO, and a build that concatenates to two CDN files.
